# PocketDesk OS

PocketDesk OS is a Windows 11-inspired browser desktop. It provides persistent windows, files, notes, paint, calculator, minesweeper, reliable external web browsing, wallpapers, PWA support, and deployment-ready static hosting.

## Primary Entry

- [PocketDesk OS](./): Launch the browser desktop shell.

## Public Metadata

- [Web app manifest](./manifest.webmanifest): PWA name, icons, screenshots, shortcuts, and categories.
- [Service worker](./sw.js): Static shell caching for the browser app.
- [Brand mark](./brand/pocketdesk-mark.svg): PocketDesk OS brand icon.
- [Social preview](./brand/pocketdesk-social.png): 1200x630 desktop preview image.
